blockingIssues.description: `collectProfileEditorData()` rebuilds `apiKey`, `customEndpoint`, and `extraHeaders` from `providerInstance` instead of reading the profile editor inputs, so `saveProfileEdits()` discards edited provider credentials, custom endpoint, and headers instead of persisting them.

`persistHistory()` no longer stores `contextTranscript`; `loadSession()` and workflow generation still consume `session.contextTranscript` / `contextHistory`, so sessions saved after the refactor lose raw context on reload and downstream workflow generation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For features whose verification steps or fulfilled assertions require manual/browser/e2e evidence, require recorded `interactiveChecks` (or an explicit deviation) before workers can report `followedProcedure: true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `sidepanel-refactor-panel-core`, `sidepanel-refactor-panel-account`, `sidepanel-refactor-panel-chat`, and `sidepanel-refactor-panel-status` all found e2e-backed UI contracts (`VAL-UI-001`, `VAL-UI-003`, `VAL-CROSS-001`, `VAL-CROSS-005`, `VAL-UI-005`) but no feature-specific interactive verification in the handoffs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Do not leave scrutiny pointed at stale handoff commits: when a later corrective feature-scoped commit supersedes an earlier incomplete handoff, update the recorded completion artifact, and do not mark a feature completed when its handoff returns to the orchestrator with unfinished work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `sidepanel-refactor-panel-core` was marked completed with handoff commit `28a625d` even though that handoff said oversized files remained and `returnToOrchestrator: true`; a later commit `8ba4387 refactor(panel-core): split 1542-line panel-core.ts into 19 focused modules` brought the files under 200 lines, but mission metadata never advanced to that artifact, so the original scrutiny review targeted the wrong commit.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat the original panel-core file-size findings from `.factory/validation/sidepanel-ui/scrutiny/reviews/sidepanel-refactor-panel-core.json` as an open blocker for the current milestone state.
rejectedObservations.reason: Superseded by later feature-scoped commit `8ba4387c4ac7611187e41a7f2cc25142bf3a518f` and confirmed by the supplemental pass review plus current file sizes (`state-manager.ts` 119, `event-handler.ts` 31, `message-processor.ts` 103).

rejectedObservations.observation: Recommend a new guidance update about the 200-line mission limit versus `check:repo-standards` using `maxLines=300`.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in `.factory/library/extension-core-notes.md` and prior extension-core scrutiny synthesis; no new action beyond the existing recommendation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Recommend another generic guidance update that workers must not mark `followedProcedure: true` when required validators or diff reviews were skipped.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already captured repeatedly in prior foundation and extension-core scrutiny syntheses; the sidepanel-ui reviews add more evidence but not a materially different remedy.
